title: NBT-Storage
description: NBT Editing mods for begginers and map with nbt items.
body:
I created this modpack for begginers in nbt editing.

My modpack is optimazed for **older pc**. And has mods for **editing nbt**, few **fps optimalization** mods,**armor stand editor** and **saved hotbar enhancer**. You can also find my **map**(_NBT Storage_), in this map you can find a lot of custom nbt items. And server where you can find many saved nbt items.
